title: lora_l2.c:1103 set_rx_callback precondition check is weak
description: Contract violation: lichen_lora_l2_set_rx_callback() - Only checks for UNINIT state at line 1105. Does not check for ABORTED or DEINITING states where mutex may be corrupted or state is transitioning. WHY: Setting callback in ABORTED state could leave callback registered in corrupted state. HOW to fix: Reject callback registration if needs_reinit() returns true or if state is DEINITING, returning -ECANCELED or -EBUSY respectively.
close_reason: Fixed lichen_lora_l2_set_rx_callback() precondition checks for aborted/needs-reinit and deiniting states; verified with focused object rebuild and full LoRa-enabled T-Echo build
